answer:
<think> Robert Justus Kleberg was a Texan who fought in the Battle of the Alamo in 1836. The Battle of the Alamo was led by James B. Bonham, James B. Bonham was not the overall commander of the Texian forces during the Battle of the Alamo, but he was one of the defenders. The overall commander of the Texian forces during the Texas Revolution was General Sam Houston. However, the question asks for the general who led the Battle of the Alamo specifically. </think>

<answer> James B. Bonham </answer>

<important> Note: While James B. Bonham was a significant figure in the Battle of the Alamo and in Texas history, he was not the overall commander of the Texian forces during the battle. The common misconception likely arises due to the prominent role Bonham played in the defense of the Alamo and his eventual death during the battle. </important>
